title: TechnologyCraft2
description: A technology integration pack that is not too many modules.
body:
## **TechCraft2 (TC2) is an open,tech Modpack.**

There are no mandatory main quests here, and you can do whatever you want here.

This integration package is small, with just over 100 mods. But it can include logistics, storage, energy, processing, mining, automation, and a few other little things. And it also provides other solutions.

In addition to tech mods, there are also some cosmetic mods.

_It may look a bit rudimentary, but it doesn't matter._

<details>
<summary>[Main] tech mods inside: (No sub-mods shown) </summary>

[ImmersiveEngineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering/version/1.20.1-10.1.0-171)

[Xnet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iu1jkWqa/a95925816a05b851e4fb3874e3877b1df1aef414_96.webp)

<details>
<summary>Other considerations:</summary>

To play this modpack, try to allocate at least 8GB of RAM.

Since this version is not yet perfected, you may encounter some unpredictable bugs when playing this modpack.

</details>
